title: Session restore with valid COMPANION token (onboarding complete) routes to companion home

preconditions.description: Expo web app is served at http://localhost:8081 via npm run web.

Before the app loads, localStorage is seeded via Playwright addInitScript with two keys: (a) 'auth_token' for expo-secure-store (confirmed: TOKEN_KEY constant in store/session.ts; expo-secure-store stores with raw key on web), and (b) 'onboarding_complete' for AsyncStorage (confirmed: lib/onboarding-storage.ts uses AsyncStorage with KEY = 'onboarding_complete'; @react-native-async-storage/async-storage stores with raw key in localStorage on web).
Playwright intercepts GET /users/me and returns HTTP 200 with a COMPANION user body before the page navigates.

testData.name: mockCompanionToken
testData.notes: Placeholder JWT string for seeding localStorage.

journey.notes: App launches at session restore splash (app/index.tsx). LoadingScreen is shown while readPersistedToken() and GET /users/me execute.
Wait for the mocked GET /users/me to complete. Session store receives COMPANION user.

After getMe() resolves with COMPANION user, app calls router.replace('/(companion)/home'). The companion layout then checks hasCompletedOnboarding() — which returns true from the seeded storage value — so onboarding redirect does not fire.

assertions.notes: Confirm session restore called GET /users/me. Full URL is http://localhost:3000/users/me per EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL default in lib/config.ts.
Route must contain 'home', confirming /(companion)/home was reached.
The companion home stub renders 'Companion Home — Milestone 2'. Partial text 'Companion Home' is sufficient.
Onboarding text must not be visible — the companion layout's onboarding check must have passed because hasCompletedOnboarding() returned true from the seeded storage.
Client home must not be visible — COMPANION role must not land in the client group.

notes: Confirmed storage libraries: auth token uses expo-secure-store (TOKEN_KEY='auth_token', raw key in localStorage on web); onboarding flag uses @react-native-async-storage/async-storage (KEY='onboarding_complete', raw key in localStorage on web).
The companion layout (app/(companion)/_layout.tsx) calls hasCompletedOnboarding() after confirming the COMPANION role. Both storage keys must be seeded before the app JS runs via addInitScript.
companion/home.tsx in M01 is a stub rendering 'Companion Home — Milestone 2'.
